headline: Good post on the dynamics of AI pricing right now. We’re basically going to see a barbell dynamic on pricing between high cost frontier models and cheap but good open or closed weights models. Then the question is how do you maximize efficiency from the frontier models, and get better quality and performance of the cheaper models. That’s where the applied AI layer comes in. The applied layer can route to the best model at any time given the workload at hand, as well as mitigate either high token costs or worse performance. The closer you are to the underlying workflow, the better you can tune the use of models for a given business process. That’s all about understanding the workflows, domain specific FDEs, evals by customer or process, getting data setup well for agents, and more. Overall good for applied AI.

headline: This is a new paradigm for interacting with Claude that is significantly more "inline" with all the other human activity org-wide. Once you do all of the under the hood engineering work to make this "just work" (e.g. across tools, integrations, compute environments, memory, security, etc.), Claude basically joins the team in a seamless way - you can talk to it as you would talk to a person and it can help with a very large variety of workloads. Imo this is the 3rd major redesign of LLM UIUX. The first paradigm was that the LLM is a website you go to, the second was that it is an app you download to your computer. This third one is that it is a self-contained, persistent, asynchronous entity with org-wide tools and context, working alongside teams of humans. It really takes a while to wrap your head around it, but it works and it is awesome.
Built using @conductor_build, @AnthropicAI Opus 4.8, @shopify UCP CLI and @Railway. Live now here: https://t.co/oSJhkFkEKP

Introducing Plug That Shop 🔌 So @Shopify launched their UCP CLI that allows all the products on their stores available via the command line. I was thinking of interesting use cases for the CLI over the weekend and realized that I can use this to create contextual embedded shops for websites. So now, you can enter your website and get four HIGHLY relevant shops that you can embed in just one click. For the buyer using this shop, it's an insanely simple experience since they can click buy and checkout with Shop in literally one click. Available, free to use, NO affiliate revenue at plugthatshop dot com Feedback welcome!

abstract: SpaceX债市首秀！获得近900亿美元，约3.6倍认购订单，低于今年以来投资级债券平均4倍的认购规模。同时本次发债资金扎堆涌向短期品种，10年期债券利差仍比英特尔高出50基点；标普预警公司烧钱至2030年且明年提速。分析指出，债券回报不因公司超预期表现而提升，更关注偿债能力与现金流。

headline: I’ve had the chance to see this ecosystem from the different sides - enterprises, agent startups, data providers, labs. The core tension here is that the business models, moats, value exchange, execution playbooks for all players are being figured out in real time. This debate around token pricing is really a debate over where value will accrue - models, application layer, distribution or other layers. Expect a lot of strong opinions from the different sides to shape the narrative in their favor.
